title: [ZH] 整合的移动通信运营商 — 解绑前

label.zh: 整合的移动通信运营商(中文版)

description.en: The pre-unbundling archetype: one company runs the network, holds the customer base, and develops new products in-house. Three economic logics — scale, scope, speed — collide inside one P&L.
description.zh: 解绑前的 archetype:一家公司同时运营网络、握住客户、自研新产品。三种经济逻辑(规模/范围/速度)在同一张报表里互相打架。
